transcription.text: I get it. It's hard to change me. I'm pretty loyal. I've been on the same team for 17 years. Same coach for 11. Never switched my number once. I start every warm up with a pass from the same guy. What's up Curtis? And I shoot from the same spot every time. So you can imagine how good something has to be for me to change. What's up Curtis?

metadata.title: 2025 Google Pixel 10 Pro Change: Can't Beat It featuring Stephen Curry
